summary: Completed comprehensive testing of site settings system with admin functionality and mobile responsive design

minor_issues.issue: Legacy status endpoints return 404 - not implemented
minor_issues.impact: No impact - these endpoints are not part of current requirements

passed_tests: Admin panel Sivusto (Settings) tab accessible and functional
Hero section settings (slogan, titles, description, badges) editable
About section settings (subtitle, title, text fields, year) editable
Contact section settings (title, subtitle, address, email, phones) editable
Homepage loads dynamic content from API (TEST SLOGAN visible)
About section shows dynamic API content (Test About Title visible)
Contact section shows dynamic API content (Test Contact Title visible)
Mobile responsive navbar with hamburger menu
Mobile navigation menu opens with all links (Palvelut, Meistä, etc.)
Mobile content readable and properly formatted
Settings form fields show current API values
All CRUD operations for services, references, partners
